dialogos.texto_en: Wow...
This is...beyond my imagination...
(The lobby's stylish design, boasting a pool and\n fitness center, its convenient location near tourist\n attractions...)
(Without a doubt,\n this is a top-notch resort hotel!!)
Oh, it's even better than I thought!
The restaurant here has a good reputation too.\nIt covers all kinds of food,\nand the desserts are said to be superb!
Ahaha. Itsuki, your eyes are sparkling, you know?
I heard that the night view from the lounge\nis also beautiful. Let's go see it at night.
H-hey, you guys are so calm.\nDo you always stay at hotels like this\nwhen you travel?
Nah. Not always.
Father splurged a little\nbecause it's our graduation trip.
This is a little, huh...
I'm back. I finished checking us in.
Thank you, Ichika.
The reservation is for four twin rooms.\nHow should we divide the rooms?
Are the layouts the same for all of them?
Yes, they're all the same size\nand have the same amenities.
Well, we could ask for an extra bed in one of the rooms\nand have three people sleep in it,\nbut there's no need to get a triple room, right?
(Twin rooms,\n does that mean Ichika and I\n will be in the same room...?)
(No, no! What am I thinking?! Even if we're dating,\n it's not appropriate for us to stay in the same room\n during a trip with everyone else!!)
Futaro-kun, what's wrong?
Wha?! Nothing's wrong!!
Hmm?\nYou're making a funny face.
It's nothing!\nAnyway, how about Raiha and I share a room?
Well, sure.\nRaiha-chan would feel more at ease too.
Or maybe since Uesugi-kun is the only man,\nhe can have a room to himself?
Yes, yes, that's fine!\nThen I want to be in the same room as Raiha-chan!
I wanna room with Yotsuba-san too!\nWe're here together after all.
R-Raiha-chan!\nThat makes me so happy!
So, you two are settled, then.\nWhat about you, Ichika?
(Sh-she wouldn't... With me...)
I don't think it's worth thinking too much.\nWhy don't we just go in order? I'll be with Nino.
(I knew it!!)
Okay, but if you make a mess, I'll kick you out.
Ahahaha, I'll do my best.
The other room will be for Miku and me, right?
Yeah, that's fine.
Okay then!\nNow that the room assignments are settled,\nlet's head to the restaurant right away!
You suddenly got excited.\nAre you always like that when you're hungry?
Oooh...
Th-that's fine, isn't it?\nI'm looking forward\nto trying authentic Okinawan cuisine!
I'm excited too!\nI wonder what kind of dishes they'll serve.
Maybe they'll have goya champuru?\nOr perhaps soki soba, Okinawa leeks, or chinsuko.
You're just randomly enumerating foods you know, right?
Also, chinsuko is a snack.
I-it could actually be served as a dessert?\nKidding.
Well, it's a bit early, but it might be a good time\nfor dinner. At this time,\nit's not quite the right time to go sightseeing.
Then, let's leave the luggage to the bellhop.
O-okay.
(These guys are so used to relying on bellhops.\n They're really comfortable with it.)
Hehe!\nIt's okay, Futaro-kun.
Huh? What's wrong?
You seemed unusually shy.\nIt's rare seeing you so...flustered.
Ah...
It's okay to indulge in luxury once in a while.
You worked hard enough to graduate us,\nwho were on the verge of failing, and you even managed\nto get into a top university yourself.
This is your reward.
O-okay...\nThat's right.
(The reason it looked like I was nervous was\n because of the room assignment problem!\n B-but...how could I really tell her?!)
What's wrong with both of you?
Ah, sorry, sorry.\nWe'll go now.
Now, Futaro-kun.\nLet's go enjoy the taste of Okinawa first.
Yeah.
